column2: Son, Holland, September 19th, 1944. German tanks of the 107th Panzer Brigade attack along the South side of the canal. Bonus scenario (out of chronological sequence). Special rule: within the first two turns, the Germans must move a tank within 2 hexes of the bridge or within 1 hex of an American unit.
The German player wins by having the only units in hex 5C3 and 5G5 at the end of any game turn.
North of the canal on board 5: 1 Squad, 2 Bazookas, 1 57mm AT Gun, 1 Foxhole. South of the canal on board 5: 2 Squads, 1 MG, 2 DECOY, 1 Foxhole.
South of the canal on board 7. All infantry must set up in woods hexes.
